whyUs.title: Why Choose
whyUs.premiumFleetDesc: Modern, well-maintained cruise ships with luxurious interiors for your comfort.
whyUs.maxSafetyDesc: Armed forest guards, life jackets, GPS, VHF radio & fire safety on every trip.
whyUs.allInclusiveDesc: Meals, forest fees, guides, and activities — everything included in one price.
whyUs.support247Desc: Round-the-clock customer support via WhatsApp for bookings & inquiries.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Bringing you the finest cruise experiences across Bangladesh's magnificent waterways.
about.storyP1: Lucky Tours & Travels was founded with a simple vision: to let everyone experience the incredible beauty of Bangladesh's waterways. From the mystical Sundarbans to the serene rivers of the south, our cruise tours offer an unforgettable journey through nature's finest landscapes.
about.storyP2: Over the years, we have served thousands of happy travellers, and our commitment to safety, comfort, and exceptional service has made us one of the most trusted names in cruise tourism.
about.ourMissionDesc: To provide world-class cruise experiences at affordable prices, making water tourism accessible to all Bangladeshis and international visitors.
about.ourValuesDesc: Safety, integrity, customer satisfaction, and environmental responsibility guide everything we do on and off the water.
about.ourPromiseDesc: Every trip is backed by our commitment to quality, safety, and creating unforgettable memories that last a lifetime.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Get in touch today!
contact.messageSentVia: Your message will be sent directly via WhatsApp

footer.tagline: Your trusted cruise tour partner in Bangladesh. Explore rivers, coasts, and the majestic Sundarbans with us.
